$description: Structure for individual investigation findings. Every finding must include a citation tracing it to a specific tool execution.
title: Short descriptive title of the finding
description: Detailed description of what was found, including specific artifact details (paths, offsets, timestamps, process names).
citations: [TOOL: volatility3.pslist, evidence: memory.raw, PID: 4832, ImageFileName: svchost.exe]
timeline_description: Where this finding falls in the attack narrative
analyst_notes: Any additional analytical observations or caveats about this finding
